page: Alibaba Cloud ecs.d1ne.2xlarge is a storage-focused virtual machine instance powered by the KVM hypervisor. It features 8 dedicated physical cores on an Intel Xeon E5-2682v4 processor running at 2.5 GHz. The system is equipped with 32.0 GB of x86_64 memory, providing 4.0 GB of RAM per core. A defining characteristic of this instance is its massive bundled local storage, consisting of 23,622 GB of HDD capacity, alongside a baseline network bandwidth of 6 Gbps. No GPUs are included in this hardware configuration.

Benchmark results indicate that the CPU performance is modest, with stress-ng and Geekbench single-core and multi-core metrics falling into the bottom 25%. However, the memory subsystem demonstrates average performance, with uncached read and write large-block bandwidths reaching 39.05 GB/sec and 35.66 GB/sec respectively. Redis SET operations also perform at an average level, achieving 5.78 million operations per second. Conversely, tasks requiring intensive computation or compression, such as single-threaded gzip compression and medium-sized LLM inference, show weaker results, placing in the bottom 10% to 25%.

Given the combination of massive local HDD capacity and moderate compute performance, this instance offers high resource density for storage-heavy workloads. It is qualitatively cost-efficient for scenarios requiring large-scale data retention where high-speed SSD IOPS are not a primary requirement. The hardware profile is best suited for cold data storage, sequential log processing, large-scale data archiving, and distributed file systems that benefit from high local storage capacity per instance.
description: Alibaba Cloud ecs.d1ne.2xlarge is a storage-focused instance featuring 8 dedicated Intel Xeon E5-2682v4 CPU cores running at 2.5 GHz and 32.0 GB of RAM. It is distinguished by a massive 23,622 GB of local HDD storage and a 6 Gbps baseline network bandwidth. While CPU benchmarks from Geekbench and stress-ng place the instance in the lower 25th percentile, its memory bandwidth and Redis SET operations achieve average performance tiers. Lacking a GPU, this instance is not designed for acceleration tasks. Instead, its high storage-to-compute ratio makes it a qualitatively cost-effective option for data-dense workloads. It is best suited for large-scale sequential data processing, cold storage, archiving, and distributed file systems where massive local capacity is prioritized over high-speed SSD performance.
og_description: Alibaba Cloud ecs.d1ne.2xlarge is a storage-focused instance featuring 8 Intel Xeon vCPUs, 32 GB RAM, and a massive 23,622 GB of local HDD storage, designed for data archiving and sequential processing.
meta_description: Alibaba Cloud ecs.d1ne.2xlarge features 8 Intel Xeon vCPUs, 32 GB RAM, and 23.6 TB of local HDD storage for storage-intensive workloads.
tagline: A storage-dense instance featuring massive local HDD capacity and dedicated Intel processors for large-scale data archiving and sequential workloads.
bullet_points: 8 dedicated Intel Xeon E5-2682v4 physical cores at 2.5 GHz
Massive 23,622 GB of local HDD storage capacity
32.0 GB of system memory with 4.0 GB per core
Best suited for cold storage, data archiving, and sequential log processing
